description_long: This is a medium-sized, open cardboard box with four flaps, two of which are fully extended outward while the other two are partially open. The box is constructed from corrugated cardboard, giving it a light brown color with a slightly rough, matte finish. A dark band runs along the upper edge of the box, possibly representing reinforced tape or a shadow from the open flaps. The interior of the box is visible, showing the same cardboard material as the exterior. The bottom of the box appears flat and stable, suitable for resting on various surfaces. This type of box is commonly used for shipping, moving, or storing items in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or delivery areas.
description: A medium-sized, open cardboard box with four flaps and a dark band along the top edge, showing a light brown, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view of the open cardboard box with all four flaps visible, two flaps angled outward and two partially open.
description_view_1: Top-down view showing the open interior and the arrangement of the four flaps, with the dark band clearly visible along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with all four flaps open and the dark band along the upper edge.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite side, showing the open interior and flap arrangement, similar to view 1.
